result: F-HOLO-9 (POSITIVE - holonomy specificity): on a genuinely non-abelian task (do two matched-magnitude regional holonomies commute), every generic/abelian method on raw edges is at chance (trivial 0.509, generic-MLP 0.541, abelian 0.520) while the framework rotor_holonomy commutator solves it (1.000). MLP-on-holonomies 0.994 localizes the specificity to the LOOP EXTRACTION (ordered non-commutative composition), which generic raw methods can't do.

NEW_CANONICAL_CAPABILITY: F-HOLO-9 - ordered non-abelian composition is NECESSARY; generic methods structurally blind
novelty_classification.note: First clean holonomy-specificity win in the arc; closes the F-HOLO-8 open question and characterizes WHEN the framework's specific ops are justified (non-abelian/order-dependent signals only).

components_added_or_updated: noncommute module (sample_noncommute + commutator_angle + region_holonomy) - the non-abelian discriminating task + readout
guards_added: characterization guard: justify the framework's SPECIFIC ops only on non-abelian/order-dependent signals; on scalar/2nd-order signals use the simple baseline (F-HOLO-2/8)

integrity_note: framework-commutator=1.0 is a NECESSITY demo (the commutator IS the planted signal), not a learned win - stated. The generic arms at chance (given a fair MLP attempt) establish structural blindness. abelian-blindness (magnitude matched) proved in code.
honest_scope: synthetic; the win is 'ordered non-abelian composition is necessary'; a learned holonomy-native model on this task, and real pose-graph data, are the next rungs.
next_experiment_authorized: (a) a LEARNED holonomy-native model (RotorMeshNet + transported-DFA, F-HOLO-6) on this non-abelian task - does the LEARNING discover the commutator where a generic MLP-on-raw can't? (b) real pose-graph SLAM loop-closure consistency (SE(3) holonomy) - NOW justified by F-HOLO-9 (the scalar/curvature tasks were not).
next_experiment_proposal: run RotorMeshNet + transported-DFA on the non-commutativity task (raw edges input): if the learned rotor machinery reaches the commutator's AUROC where the generic MLP is at chance, learning-holonomy-native is demonstrated on a task where it is necessary - the capstone. THEN pose-graph g2o.
